function.content:
---
record_type: outbound_email
created_at: 2026-03-23T16:35:00Z
send_state: draft
to:
  - claudia@helios-tax.example
subject: "Re: invoice copy needed"
attachments:
  - 50_finance/invoices/2026_04_14__eur_000780__inv_0010__helios_checklist_pack_invoice.md
---
Hi Claudia,

Resending the Helios Steuerbüro München GmbH invoice dated 14-04-2026 (INV-0010), attached here.

Best,
Miles

next_step.current_state: Outbox write completed and appears compliant: attachment path was read earlier, single attachment ordering trivially newest-first, recipient matches canonical primary_contact_email, subject quoted safely. Next finalize workflow by deleting processed inbox item.
next_step.observation: Created outbound email record at 60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-03-23T16-35-00Z.md for Claudia with the requested 2026-04-14 invoice attached.

next_step.current_state: Task actions complete: read required rulebooks/workflows, verified sender identity, processed all 6 related finance files, prepared outbound email with requested invoice, deleted inbox item.
next_step.observation: Deleted 00_inbox/000_invoice-request.md after completing requested resend workflow.

function.message: Processed the next inbox item and completed the request. I verified the sender against Claudia’s canonical entity record, reviewed all 6 related Helios finance files listed in preflight, identified the exact requested invoice dated 14-04-2026 (INV-0010), created an outbound email draft with that invoice attached at 60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-03-23T16-35-00Z.md, and then removed the handled inbox item.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed mandatory bootstrap (tree /, read AGENTS, context), read nested AGENTS in entered folders, used inbox-email header as canonical transport metadata, verified sender via entity primary_contact_email, processed all preflight-listed related finance files, created outbound email in 60_outbox/outbox per sending-email workflow, and deleted inbox item only after full completion.
function.outcome_justification: Canonical evidence shows inbox sender claudia@helios-tax.example matches 10_entities/cast/claudia.md primary_contact_email, and the specific requested invoice date 14-04-2026 corresponds to 50_finance/invoices/2026_04_14__eur_000780__inv_0010__helios_checklist_pack_invoice.md. All 6 preflight-related finance files were read before completion, then outbound draft was recorded and inbox item removed per inbox-processing workflow.
completed_steps_laconic: read all 6 preflight-listed Helios invoice files
